expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":3},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["All done — your Tanzania trip is now in one place"]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"success","title":"Ready to open"},"children":["Your trip app is live at ",{"type":"strong","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organizer"]},". Open it on your phone or laptop — everything from your notes, spreadsheet, park-fee PDF, voice memo, and photo is now organized under one roof."]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":3},"children":["What's in the app"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Dashboard — trip overview: Vasileios & Athina Mari, Aug 3–20 2026, Egypt → Arusha → safari → Zanzibar → Dar","Costs — all line items from your spreadsheet, tracked (flights: €2,707, everything else: $3,344.20)","Itinerary — every leg with dates, flights, and accommodations","Contacts — Richard, Emmanuel, and everyone you named in the notes","Reference — a central spot for per-topic detail (park rules, tipping, what you bought)"]},"children":[]},{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":3},"children":["Behind the scenes"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I also built 11 topic-specific knowledge spaces — one for every distinct part of your trip (Egypt stopovers, Arusha, the safari circuit, Ngorongoro, Zanzibar, Dar, plus cross-cutting ones like flights, budget, and travel documents). When you ask me \"what's the ranger tip again?\" or \"do I need a Yellow Fever cert?\" it'll answer from your own material first, no digging."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"One loose end — the ranger tip"},"children":["Emmanuel mentioned an extra TZS 5,000 ranger tip at the crater gate, separate from park fees, and you wanted to ask Richard about it before the safari balance payment. That's noted in the Ngorongoro space — ask me about it when you've talked to Richard and I'll update the app."]}]}

errors.statement:
// One option file per aspect (>=2), each a distinct sub-topic grounded in `findings`, with a Source line.
const mandatoryInsuranceFinding = findings.find(f => f.heading.toLowerCase().includes("insurance"));

// Extract the operator & contact finding, which covers Richard, Emmanuel, and Pesapal.
const contactFinding = findings.find(fnd => fnd.heading === "Operator & Contact");

// Extract the park-fees finding for detailed breakdown content.
const parkFeesFinding = findings.find(f => f.heading && f.heading.toLowerCase().includes("park fees"));

Block-scoped variable 'result' used before its declaration.
errors.statement:

const result = await inspect([result]);

const buildResult = await inspect([result]);

contacts.name: Richard
contacts.notes: Safari deposit $240 paid. Balance $960 due on arrival. Pesapal: payments.pesapal.com/suricatasafaris

contacts.name: Emmanuel
contacts.notes: Mentioned ranger tip ~TZS 5,000 cash at gate. Confirm with Richard before balance payment.

cost_items.detail: Aegean A3932 (ZZJQUU), EgyptAir ×2, Precision Air TC144/TC145, Aegean A3935 (ZZL22S)
Deposit $240 paid; $960 balance due on arrival (cash or Pesapal +5%). Contact Richard +255 763 222 293
Non-EA, per trip. Note: ranger tip ~TZS 5,000 cash at gate — confirm with Richard
IDP required + local permit ~$15, valid ≤3 months

cost_items.description: Maasai beaded bracelets at Ngorongoro rim
cost_items.detail: TZS ~35,000 (~$25). Bought from Maasai lady for Athina. Voice memo.

cost_items.description: Sunny Shore B&B, Dar es Salaam (2 nights)

itinerary_legs.title: Cairo Stopover
itinerary_legs.notes: Arrival from Athens on Aegean A3932 (ref ZZJQUU)

itinerary_legs.title: Arusha Pre-Safari
itinerary_legs.notes: Flight DAR→ARK Precision Air TC144 on Aug 5

itinerary_legs.title: Northern Safari Circuit
itinerary_legs.notes: 3-day group camping. Deposit $240 paid, $960 due on arrival.

itinerary_legs.title: Stone Town
itinerary_legs.notes: Flight ARK→ZNZ Precision Air TC145. Explore historic Stone Town.

itinerary_legs.title: Kiwengwa Beach
itinerary_legs.notes: Beach relaxation. The Rock Restaurant dinner Aug 15 18:00–20:00.

itinerary_legs.title: Dar es Salaam
itinerary_legs.notes: Final Tanzania stop before Cairo departure.

itinerary_legs.title: Cairo Departure Stopover
itinerary_legs.notes: Depart Aug 20 on Aegean A3935 (ref ZZL22S)

trip_notes.title: Stone Town Courtyard View
trip_notes.content: A bright courtyard view of a whitewashed Stone Town building with several dark carved wooden balconies and arched windows stacked upward. The blue sky and sunlight give it a warm, airy feel with a distinctive historic Swahili-Arabic atmosphere.

trip_notes.title: Ngorongoro Rim — Maasai Bracelets
trip_notes.content: Driver/guide Emmanuel (not Richard). Bought two beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the rim for Athina Mari — paid roughly TZS 35,000 (~$25, asked for $20). Emmanuel mentioned a ranger tip of ~TZS 5,000 cash at the gate, separate from park fees. Must ask Richard about this before the safari balance payment.

schema.title: Contacts
schema.description: People, vendors, and emergency contacts for the trip.

schema.title: Cost Items
schema.description: Line-item costs from the budget spreadsheet.

category.description: Flights / Lodging / Safari / Park Fees / Visas & Insurance / Dining / Other

amount_usd.description: Amount in USD (0 for EUR-only items)

amount_eur.description: Amount in EUR (0 for USD-only items)

schema.title: Itinerary Legs
schema.description: Each leg of the trip with dates, location, accommodation, and cost.

schema.title: Trip Notes
schema.description: Memories, voice memo transcripts, and other unstructured notes from the trip.

schema.title: Trips
schema.description: Master trip record with key metadata.
